focus_points.label: Next-level stretch in design craft and scope
focus_points.reason: What they want to build next, in concrete design moves, and what would make the next step feel real.

focus_points.label: How critique and feedback are landing
focus_points.reason: Whether feedback they give and receive is improving decisions and quality, or stalling progress — worth clarifying how it’s working in practice.

focus_points.label: Stakeholder influence beyond the design team
focus_points.reason: What they’re doing to shape product decisions through trust and clear tradeoffs, not just deliverables.

focus_points.label: Where their work is moving the business
focus_points.reason: What outcomes they can point to where their design leadership created measurable leverage this cycle.
